description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in historical or ceremonial attire, featuring a long-sleeved, double-breasted jacket with prominent gold buttons and decorative shoulder accents. He wears loose-fitting trousers tucked into tall boots, and a sash with an ornate emblem drapes diagonally across his torso. The figure has shoulder-length hair and a full beard, and his head is covered with a cylindrical hat. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his facial expression is stern and focused. The overall appearance suggests a uniformed role, possibly a guard, officer, or ceremonial figure from a past era.
description: A male adult in historical or ceremonial uniform with a sash, tall boots, and a cylindrical hat, standing upright with a stern expression.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the face, the cylindrical hat, and the drape of the sash across the chest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the sash's emblem, the back of the jacket, and the full length of the boots.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, showing the other arm and the side of the jacket and trousers.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the facial features, double-breasted jacket with gold buttons, and the sash across the chest.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style ceremonial jacket with decorative buttons, sash with emblem, loose trousers, and tall boots
